requirements.name: [critical] Start with rg and/or ast-grep candidate discovery and promote to just semantic-probe for owner evidence.
requirements.evidence: The executor proposed rg and just sg-cs first, then just semantic-probe --method Show --owner XRL.UI.Popup.

requirements.name: [critical] Do not treat ast-grep hits or method-name matches as proof of XRL.UI.Popup ownership.
requirements.evidence: The executor explicitly called those hits candidates and same-name Show methods false-positive risks.

requirements.name: [critical] Keep candidate/unresolved semantic-probe rows visible as uncertainty.
requirements.evidence: The executor preserved candidate_matching_owner_hits and unresolved_hits as visible uncertainty.

requirements.name: Do not require a purpose-built inventory for a one-off investigation.
requirements.evidence: The executor reserved inventories for recurring or artifact-grade work.

unclear_points: The exact untranslated text string was not provided, so the initial rg query would need the observed text when available.
Translation routing depends on docs/RULES.md, which was outside the target-doc set for the evaluation.
discretionary_assumptions: The task is investigative and read-only.
Static semantic evidence guides the routing hypothesis but does not prove runtime behavior.

requirements.name: [critical] Do not route localization placeholder or prose QA to Roslyn semantic-probe or inventory.
requirements.evidence: The executor treated the task as localization asset QA, not C# static analysis.

requirements.name: [critical] Route to localization/token validation instead of C# owner/sink tools.
requirements.evidence: The executor chose just translation-token-check and just localization-check.

requirements.name: Explain what would make rg/ast-grep or semantic-probe relevant later.
requirements.evidence: The executor limited rg to locating assets and semantic-probe to later C# owner questions.

requirements.name: Do not invent a new tool or skill.
requirements.evidence: The executor used existing validation commands and scoped guides.

unclear_points: The specific XML file, entry key, source prose, and Japanese translation were not provided.
Whether the task is read-only QA or later includes an asset edit was unspecified.
discretionary_assumptions: Placeholder validity should be checked deterministically before prose review.
Translation naturalness can be reviewed manually after token checks pass.

requirements.name: [critical] Promote beyond generic just semantic-probe to the purpose-built Roslyn static producer inventory path.
requirements.evidence: The executor selected scripts/scan_static_producer_inventory.py and StaticProducerInventoryScanner for EmitMessage, Popup.Show*, and AddPlayerMessage.

requirements.name: [critical] Name the tracked artifact and regeneration/check recipes.
requirements.evidence: The executor named docs/static-producer-inventory.json, just static-producer-regenerate-tracked, just static-producer-check, and just static-producer-preview.

requirements.name: [critical] Require explicit candidate/unresolved status handling and explain deltas.
requirements.evidence: The executor required roslyn_symbol_status handling and delta explanations for false-positive removal, new coverage, or classification changes.

requirements.name: Keep rg/ast-grep as candidate exploration, not source of truth.
requirements.evidence: The executor kept rg and ast-grep for candidate and call-shape exploration only.

discretionary_assumptions: Same-name false positives should be excluded by Roslyn symbols or fully qualified containing type.
Existing baseline expectations apply unless the downstream consumer accepts changed candidate or unresolved counts.
proposed_skill_changes: Make the initial lane choice and tracked static producer artifact boundary more visible near the top of the Roslyn static-analysis skill.
